Anderson Brothers Play Duke at Newport
description: Grammy-Winning virtuosos on clarinet (New York Times) identical twins and Washington, DC natives Peter Take the A Train, Black and Tan Fantasy, Sophisticated Lady, and Mood Indigo. The most prolific American composer of all-time, Duke Ellington broke musical barriers of popular music and created a distinctive compositional style traveling with his jazz orchestra around the world for over fifty years. Peter and Will Anderson have headlined at The Blue Note, Jazz at Lincoln Center, The Kennedy Center, New Orleans Jazz Festival, Feinsteins 54 Below, live on Garrison Keillors Prairie Home Companion, and can be heard on the Grammy-winning soundtrack of HBOs Boardwalk Empire with Vince Giordanos Nighthawks. Peter and Will can be heard and seen in the major motion pictures Revolutionary Road, Killers of the Flower Moon, Boardwalk Empire, and The Marvelous Ms. Maisel.
